message:
agent: Session wrapped in Arc<Mutex> for thread-safe sharing

Refactor AgentSession to use Arc<Mutex<Session>> instead of bare Session:

Test updates across modules:
- agent.rs: extensions_integration_tests and abort_tests now create
  Session::in_memory() wrapped in Arc::new(Mutex::new(...))
- turn_event_tests: explicitly use std::sync::Mutex for event capture
  (distinct from asupersync::sync::Mutex for Session)
- extension_tools.rs: test session creation updated
- agent_loop_vcr.rs: Session::create_with_dir wrapped in Arc<Mutex>
- rpc_mode.rs, rpc_protocol.rs: test setup updates

persist_new_messages signature:
- Changed from &mut self to &self since session access is now
  through mutex locking, not mutable borrow

This enables sharing the session between the agent loop and other
components (like compaction) without ownership conflicts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
